news-global-econ.title: Adani Green seeks $1 billion offshore loan after US settlement
news-global-econ.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd. is seeking to raise as much as $1 billion through an offshore loan, according to people familiar with the matter, its first overseas borrowing since emerging from legal troubles in the US.

news-global-econ.title: JD Vance left stunned following 'The View' appearance, reveals what Joy Behar told him during commercial break
news-global-econ.description: Vice President JD Vance reveals Joy Behar called him 'pretty good for a Republican' during a break on his first appearance on The View this week.

news-global-econ.title: Oakland school district vowed reparations for Black students, yet outcomes appear stagnant after 5 years
news-global-econ.description: Oakland's reparations task force for Black students failed to meet objectives after five years. A member says the group "wasted our collective breath for a whole year."

news-global-soc.description:

news-global-soc.title: Jemele Hill says UFC event at the White House was 'performative patriotism' that lacked 'diversity'
news-global-soc.description: Jemele Hill criticized the UFC 250 Freedom event hosted by Donald Trump, comparing it to Temu WrestleMania and calling it ostentatious and out of place.

news-global-soc.title: Son of Mango fashion billionaire heard tearfully telling 911 operator his father had 'fallen down a ravine'
news-global-soc.description: Jonathan Andic's 911 call released as he tearfully reported his billionaire father Isak Andic had fallen down a ravine near Barcelona in December 2024.
